name: Monster Rebone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>横</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>取</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りボーン
desc: If your opponent Special Summoned a monster this turn: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your opponent's Graveyard; Special Summon it to your side of the field in Defense Position. When this card leaves the field, banish that monster. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.
eff: If your opponent Special Summoned a monster this turn: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your opponent's Graveyard; Special Summon it to your side of the field in Defense Position. When this card leaves the field, banish that monster. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
banished: Banishes cards when it leaves the field
